creator: yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
"Akinori MUSHA" <knu@iDaemons.org> wrote:
> > By the way, what about making dcc a separate port that irchat-pj-* and
> > liece-* depend on?  All those four ports install ${LOCALBASE}/bin/dcc
> > and it will be mercilessly removed when any of them is deinstalled...

Following is the fix for this. New ports irc/{dcc,liece-dcc},
and fix for irchat-pj and liece ports(separation.diff).
--
yoichi


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	dcc
#	dcc/Makefile
#	dcc/distinfo
#	dcc/pkg-comment
#	dcc/pkg-descr
#	dcc/pkg-plist
#	liece-dcc
#	liece-dcc/Makefile
#	liece-dcc/distinfo
#	liece-dcc/pkg-comment
#	liece-dcc/pkg-descr
#	liece-dcc/pkg-plist
#	separation.diff
#
echo c - dcc
mkdir -p dcc > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - dcc/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >dcc/Makefile << 'END-of-dcc/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	dcc
X# Date Created:		6 May 2001
X# Whom:			Yoichi NAKAYAMA <yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp>
X#
X# $FreeBSD: $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	dcc
XPORTVERSION=	2.5.3
XCATEGORIES=	irc
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.fan.gr.jp/pub/elisp/irchat-pj/2.5/
XDISTNAME=	irchat-pj-${PORTVERSION}p
X
XMAINTAINER=	yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
X
XALL_TARGET=	dcc
XLDFLAGS=	${PTHREAD_LIBS}
XCFLAGS+=	${PTHREAD_CFLAGS} -DUSE_PTHREAD -DENABLE_PTHREAD_ATTR
XMAKE_ENV+=	LDFLAGS="${LDFLAGS}"
X
Xdo-install:
X	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/dcc ${PREFIX}/bin
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-dcc/Makefile
echo x - dcc/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >dcc/distinfo << 'END-of-dcc/distinfo'
XMD5 (irchat-pj-2.5.3p.tar.gz) = c282428b34e2042197de6f680b6280e6
END-of-dcc/distinfo
echo x - dcc/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >dcc/pkg-comment << 'END-of-dcc/pkg-comment'
XDCC program
END-of-dcc/pkg-comment
echo x - dcc/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >dcc/pkg-descr << 'END-of-dcc/pkg-descr'
Xdcc program which is used by irchat-pj
END-of-dcc/pkg-descr
echo x - dcc/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >dcc/pkg-plist << 'END-of-dcc/pkg-plist'
Xbin/dcc
END-of-dcc/pkg-plist
echo c - liece-dcc
mkdir -p liece-dcc > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - liece-dcc/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >liece-dcc/Makefile << 'END-of-liece-dcc/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	liece-dcc
X# Date Created:		6 May 2001
X# Whom:			Yoichi NAKAYAMA <yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp>
X#
X# $FreeBSD: $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	liece-dcc
XPORTVERSION=	1.4.4
XCATEGORIES=	irc
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.unixuser.org/~ueno/liece/dist/
XDISTNAME=	liece-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=	yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
X
XHAS_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XALL_TARGET=	dcc
X
Xdo-build:
X	cd ${WRKSRC}/dcc; ${GMAKE}
Xdo-install:
X	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/dcc/ldcc ${PREFIX}/bin
X	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/dcc/ltcp ${PREFIX}/bin
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-liece-dcc/Makefile
echo x - liece-dcc/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >liece-dcc/distinfo << 'END-of-liece-dcc/distinfo'
XMD5 (liece-1.4.4.tar.gz) = e2ad08e4c80c4a5a9d323f736a54e91e
END-of-liece-dcc/distinfo
echo x - liece-dcc/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >liece-dcc/pkg-comment << 'END-of-liece-dcc/pkg-comment'
XDCC program for liece
END-of-liece-dcc/pkg-comment
echo x - liece-dcc/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >liece-dcc/pkg-descr << 'END-of-liece-dcc/pkg-descr'
Xdcc program for Liece.
END-of-liece-dcc/pkg-descr
echo x - liece-dcc/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >liece-dcc/pkg-plist << 'END-of-liece-dcc/pkg-plist'
Xbin/ldcc
Xbin/ltcp
END-of-liece-dcc/pkg-plist
echo x - separation.diff
sed 's/^X//' >separation.diff << 'END-of-separation.diff'
XIndex: irchat-pj-emacs20/Makefile
X===================================================================
XRCS file: /home/work/cvsroot/ports/irchat-pj-emacs20/Makefile,v
Xretrieving revision 1.14
Xdiff -u -r1.14 Makefile
X--- irchat-pj-emacs20/Makefile	2001/05/06 04:39:04	1.14
X+++ irchat-pj-emacs20/Makefile	2001/05/06 06:20:02
X@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
X # Date Created:		2 May 2001
X # Whom:			Yoichi NAKAYAMA <yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp>
X #
X-# $FreeBSD$
X+# $FreeBSD: $
X #
X 
X PORTNAME=	irchat-pj
X@@ -15,10 +15,13 @@
X MAINTAINER=	yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
X 
X BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/${LISPDIR:S,/${PORTNAME}$,/pure,}/pure-make.el:${PORTSDIR}/irc/pure-${EMACS_PORT_NAME}
X+RUN_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/dcc:${PORTSDIR}/irc/dcc
X 
X EMACS_PORT_NAME?=	emacs20
X LISPDIR?=	${EMACS_LIBDIR}/site-lisp/${PORTNAME}
X ETCDIR=		share/doc/${PORTNAME}
X+ALL_TARGET?=	lisp
X+INSTALL_TARGET?=	install-lisp
X 
X LDFLAGS=	${PTHREAD_LIBS}
X CFLAGS+=	${PTHREAD_CFLAGS} -DUSE_PTHREAD -DENABLE_PTHREAD_ATTR
X@@ -33,11 +36,6 @@
X 		ETCDIR=${ETCDIR}
X 
X post-install:
X-.if ${EMACS_PORT_NAME} == xemacs21-mule
X-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/dcc ${PREFIX}/bin
X-.else
X-	 strip ${PREFIX}/bin/dcc
X-.endif
X .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X 	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/${ETCDIR}
X .for f in ${DOCS}
XIndex: irchat-pj-emacs20/pkg-plist
X===================================================================
XRCS file: /home/work/cvsroot/ports/irchat-pj-emacs20/pkg-plist,v
Xretrieving revision 1.3
Xdiff -u -r1.3 pkg-plist
X--- irchat-pj-emacs20/pkg-plist	2001/05/01 16:52:40	1.3
X+++ irchat-pj-emacs20/pkg-plist	2001/05/06 06:12:23
X@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
X-bin/dcc
X %%LISPDIR%%/irchat-commands.el
X %%LISPDIR%%/irchat-commands.elc
X %%LISPDIR%%/irchat-copyright.el
XIndex: irchat-pj-xemacs21-mule/Makefile
X===================================================================
XRCS file: /home/work/cvsroot/ports/irchat-pj-xemacs21-mule/Makefile,v
Xretrieving revision 1.5
Xdiff -u -r1.5 Makefile
X--- irchat-pj-xemacs21-mule/Makefile	2001/05/06 04:39:06	1.5
X+++ irchat-pj-xemacs21-mule/Makefile	2001/05/06 05:50:47
X@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
X 
X EMACS_PORT_NAME=	xemacs21-mule
X LISPDIR=		lib/xemacs/site-packages/lisp/${PORTNAME}
X-ALL_TARGET=		package dcc
X+ALL_TARGET=		package
X INSTALL_TARGET=		install-lisp-package	
X 
X .include <${MASTERDIR}/Makefile>
XIndex: liece-emacs20/Makefile
X===================================================================
XRCS file: /home/work/cvsroot/ports/liece-emacs20/Makefile,v
Xretrieving revision 1.10
Xdiff -u -r1.10 Makefile
X--- liece-emacs20/Makefile	2001/04/10 19:15:20	1.10
X+++ liece-emacs20/Makefile	2001/05/06 05:53:55
X@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
X 
X PORTNAME=	liece
X PORTVERSION=	1.4.4
X-PORTREVISION=	1
X+PORTREVISION=	2
X CATEGORIES=	irc elisp
X MASTER_SITES=	http://www.unixuser.org/~ueno/liece/dist/
X PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-${EMACS_PORT_NAME}
X@@ -16,7 +16,8 @@
X 
X BUILD_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/share/flim/${FLIM_COOKIE}:${PORTSDIR}/editors/flim-${EMACS_PORT_NAME}-current \
X 		${LOCALBASE}/bin/msgfmt:${PORTSDIR}/devel/gettext
X-RUN_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/share/flim/${FLIM_COOKIE}:${PORTSDIR}/editors/flim-${EMACS_PORT_NAME}-current
X+RUN_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/share/flim/${FLIM_COOKIE}:${PORTSDIR}/editors/flim-${EMACS_PORT_NAME}-current \
X+		${LOCALBASE}/bin/ldcc:${PORTSDIR}/irc/liece-dcc
X 
X EMACS_PORT_NAME?=	emacs20
X LISPDIR?=		${EMACS_LIBDIR}/site-lisp/${PORTNAME}
XIndex: liece-emacs20/pkg-plist
X===================================================================
XRCS file: /home/work/cvsroot/ports/liece-emacs20/pkg-plist,v
Xretrieving revision 1.6
Xdiff -u -r1.6 pkg-plist
X--- liece-emacs20/pkg-plist	2001/04/10 19:15:21	1.6
X+++ liece-emacs20/pkg-plist	2001/05/06 05:54:11
X@@ -1,5 +1,3 @@
X-bin/ldcc
X-bin/ltcp
X %%PKGINFODIR%%/MANIFEST.liece
X %%ETCDIR%%/icons/back.xpm
X %%ETCDIR%%/icons/ball.blank.xpm
END-of-separation.diff
exit
